channel.title: NAT Tabourin, J Sarfati, U Pinar, N Beaud, J Parra, C Vaessen, F Gomez, D Benamran, G Canlorbe, J Belghiti, E Chartier-Kastler, O Cussenot, T Seisen, M Roupret | PlatCOVID

item.title: Postoperative assessment of nosocomial transmission of COVID-19 after robotic surgical procedures during the pandemic.
